text.title: Weighted Decision Matrix Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.fix: Renormalise; reject matrix until weights sum to 100%.

antipattern.symptom: All weights set by lead architect; no PM / SRE / sec signature.
antipattern.fix: Require stakeholder per criterion + signature; reject without.

antipattern.symptom: Scores filled by intuition; no benchmark / POC reference.
antipattern.fix: Block matrix sign-off until evidence column complete.

antipattern.symptom: Matrix totals identical across options; no conflict named.
antipattern.fix: Require at least one cross-criterion conflict + resolution rule.
